title: Aureline AI review-assist resolution-memory and material-diff-change vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the review_resolution_record, review_resolution_state_transition_record, review_resolution_material_diff_change_record, and review_resolution_audit_event_record families frozen in docs/ai/review_resolution_memory_contract.md. Every review_finding_record (schemas/ai/review_finding.schema.json) emitted by the AI review-assist surface resolves to exactly one review_resolution_record carrying the resolution-memory state (open / dismissed / published_local_only / published_to_review_destination / outdated_diff_changed / rerun_recommended / suppressed_by_policy / superseded_by_rerun / archived_tombstone), the actor-class that drove the state, the resolution-source class naming who or what authored the transition (user_in_active_session / repo_instruction_bundle_authored / designated_policy_file / trusted_workspace_pinned_policy / trusted_user_profile_policy / admin_policy_bundle / review_pack_check_outcome / provider_overlay_watcher / scope_freshness_watcher / rerun_engine / ai_review_overlay_recording_only / system_reconciler), the reopen-eligibility class (reopen_admitted_user / reopen_admitted_user_or_admin / reopen_admitted_admin_only / reopen_blocked_archived / reopen_blocked_suppressed_by_policy / reopen_blocked_outdated_must_rerun / reopen_blocked_superseded), the publish-eligibility class so a record never claims publish capability the local store does not actually hold, the diff-fingerprint binding that lets a material-change watcher invalidate the resolution when the bytes underneath the finding move, and the audit-linkage refs (the finding row, the scope row, optionally the publish sheet, optionally the predecessor resolution this row supersedes). The state machine is closed and admits NO auto-approve, NO auto-request-changes, and NO auto-merge transition. Transitions out of the four refusal-shaped states (suppressed_by_policy / archived_tombstone / outdated_diff_changed when its predecessor was archived / superseded_by_rerun) are admitted only through the reopen-eligibility class on the matching record; a surface that mints a transition the eligibility class refuses denies with reopen_action_refused_by_eligibility. The schema composes with (and does not replace) schemas/ai/review_finding.schema.json (the lifecycle vocabulary mirrored verbatim), schemas/ai/review_scope_selection.schema.json (the scope-freshness / scope-lineage / rerun-reason vocabulary), schemas/ai/publish_to_review_sheet.schema.json (the publish path the resolution proves succeeded or refused), schemas/ai/local_review_findings_store.schema.json (the local-only store the resolution row writes through), schemas/ai/tainted_input_source.schema.json (designated_policy_file source class is reachable only when a tainted_input_source_record carries policy_file_role_class = designated_policy_file with non-null signing_evidence_ref), and schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json (freshness_class / client_scope / redaction_class). Raw outbound text bodies, raw inline-suggestion patch bodies, raw check-annotation payloads, raw provider URLs, raw provider-thread URLs, raw author identity strings, raw notebook cell text, raw diff bodies, raw terminal bytes, raw prompt text, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit URLs, raw API keys, raw OAuth tokens, raw mTLS material, raw model weights, and raw provider payloads MUST NOT appear on any record emitted against this schema; every preview is a redaction-aware reviewable label or an opaque ref. The eventual review-assist crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record kind, resolution-state class, actor-class, resolution-source class, reopen-eligibility class, publish-eligibility class, diff-fingerprint kind, material-change verdict class, transition-trigger class, denial reason, or audit-event id is additive-minor and bumps review_resolution_memory_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

review_resolution_memory_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the review-resolution-memory vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / evidence packets / claim manifests / admin-reconciliation consoles. Raw outbound text bodies, raw inline-suggestion patch bodies, raw check-annotation payloads, raw provider URLs, raw provider-thread URLs, raw author identity strings, raw notebook cell text, raw diff bodies, raw terminal bytes, raw prompt text, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit URLs, raw API keys, raw OAuth tokens, raw mTLS material, raw model weights, and raw provider payloads never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary safe for review-history panels, support bundles, and audit exports. Never carries the raw payload byte stream beyond what the broker-owned redaction pass (ADR-0007) admits.

redaction_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json (ADR-0011). Resolution rows touching credentialed flows MUST raise to operator_only_restricted.

policy_context.description: Policy context the resolution was minted under.

resolution_state_class.description: Frozen resolution-state vocabulary. Mirrors the review_finding lifecycle_state vocabulary verbatim so a resolution row never disagrees with the finding row it summarises. open is the initial state; dismissed records an explicit user dismissal with a typed rationale on the finding row; published_local_only records a publish to the local review_workspace_record only (provider-write missing or kept-local action); published_to_review_destination records a publish through schemas/ai/publish_to_review_sheet.schema.json to a hosted destination, an imported-bundle export packet, or a support packet; outdated_diff_changed and rerun_recommended honour the matching scope_freshness_class on schemas/ai/review_scope_selection.schema.json; suppressed_by_policy records an admin / policy bundle suppression with rationale; superseded_by_rerun records that a successor resolution exists; archived_tombstone is the retain-as-tombstone state. The vocabulary admits NO auto-approve, NO auto-request-changes, and NO auto-merge transition; those actions live on schemas/vcs/merge_queue_entry.schema.json and require human approval through the merge-policy contract.

resolution_actor_class.description: Frozen actor-class vocabulary on every resolution transition. user_in_active_session is the user typing in this surface; admin_via_signed_policy is an admin acting through a signed policy bundle; ai_review_overlay_recording_only is recording-only and MUST NOT mint a publish or destination-write transition; scope_freshness_watcher is the watcher that fires outdated_diff_changed / rerun_recommended when the analyzed scope drifts; provider_overlay_watcher fires when a hosted_review_object base/head moves; rerun_engine fires when a successor scope completes; system_reconciler is the local-store reconciler that fires after a delete-request or invalidation event.

resolution_source_class.description: Frozen resolution-source vocabulary naming the directing source the transition cited. user_in_active_session = user typed the action in this surface; repo_instruction_bundle_authored = a repo AGENTS.md-style bundle carried the suppression / dismissal rule; designated_policy_file = a designated AI policy file under .aureline/ai/policy/ carried the rule and was admitted only with non-null signing_evidence_ref on the upstream tainted_input_source_record; trusted_workspace_pinned_policy / trusted_user_profile_policy = pinned-policy authority paths; admin_policy_bundle = an admin policy bundle (ADR-0008); review_pack_check_outcome = the review-pack check evaluation drove the transition; provider_overlay_watcher / scope_freshness_watcher / rerun_engine / system_reconciler = mechanical watchers. ai_review_overlay_recording_only is admissible on recording-only events but MUST NOT mint publish or destination-write transitions.

reopen_eligibility_class.description: Frozen reopen-eligibility vocabulary. reopen_admitted_user = the user can flip the state back to open in this surface; reopen_admitted_user_or_admin = the user OR admin may; reopen_admitted_admin_only = only an admin via signed policy may; the four reopen_blocked_* values fail closed and the transition denies with reopen_action_refused_by_eligibility unless preceded by the typed unblock path (rerun for outdated_must_rerun, successor archival for superseded, admin policy bundle for suppressed_by_policy, archive_tombstone reopen sheet for archived). not_applicable_state_admits_open_action_directly is the value carried on rows in open / rerun_recommended / outdated_diff_changed (not yet pinned to a predecessor archive) where the open action is admitted without a typed reopen path.

publish_eligibility_class.description: Frozen publish-eligibility vocabulary. Mirrors the publish_to_review_sheet provider_write_continuity vocabulary plus the four contract-level refusals (redaction-failed, disclosure-pending, low-confidence floor, outdated-lifecycle) so the resolution row records publish eligibility under the local store's posture rather than re-mining provider routing. publish_eligible_* values admit publish_to_destination through the publish-to-review sheet under the named continuity. The publish_blocked_* values pair through allOf gates with the matching publish_to_review_sheet redaction / attribution / continuity / lifecycle posture and the resolution_state_class is constrained out of published_to_review_destination on those values. publish_unknown_must_block is the fail-closed value. not_applicable_local_only_no_publish_proposed is admissible only when no publish has been proposed (no publish-to-review sheet bound and the action on the finding row is not publish_to_review_destination).

diff_fingerprint_kind.description: Frozen diff-fingerprint-kind vocabulary. Every resolution row carries at least one fingerprint binding the resolution to the bytes the finding was minted against. The next material-change watcher fires when one of these refs no longer matches the current scope; the matching review_resolution_material_diff_change_record records the verdict. Fingerprints are opaque refs; raw diff bodies, raw revision URLs, raw branch URLs, and raw policy bundle bytes never appear here.

material_change_verdict_class.description: Frozen material-change verdict vocabulary on the review_resolution_material_diff_change_record. Mirrors the schemas/ai/review_scope_selection.schema.json scope_freshness_class projections plus the policy / instruction-source / review-pack rerun reasons. The four *_outdated / *_rerun_recommended / *_rerun_required values force the matching resolution row's resolution_state_class out of open / published_to_review_destination / published_local_only and into outdated_diff_changed or rerun_recommended.

transition_trigger_class.description: Frozen transition-trigger vocabulary. Every state transition carries exactly one trigger so the audit stream can answer 'what fired this state change' mechanically. user_action_* triggers cite a non-null user actor; admin_policy_* triggers cite a non-null admin policy bundle; scope_freshness_* / review_pack_or_policy_updated / instruction_or_check_source_changed / rerun_completed_* / system_reconciler_invalidation are mechanical-watcher triggers; publish_blocked_* triggers record refusal-shaped transitions with the matching publish-to-review sheet refusal.

review_resolution_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the review_resolution audit stream. Denials fail closed; silent downgrade to a freshly-painted resolution, an ungated reopen, or an undisclosed publish is forbidden.

review_resolution_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the review_resolution stream. review_resolution_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a review_resolution_denial_reason.

diff_fingerprint_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound identity (revision id, selected-diff-range signature, uncommitted-index signature, provider PR/MR head, imported-bundle pin, browser-handoff pin, review-pack evaluation input signature, policy-epoch, or instruction-or-check-source signature). Raw revision URLs, raw branch URLs, raw diff bodies, raw policy bundle bytes, and raw absolute paths never appear here.

diff_fingerprint_entry.description: One fingerprint binding the resolution row to a stable identity in the analyzed scope. The next material-change watcher whose verdict cites a different value for this kind forces the resolution into outdated_diff_changed / rerun_recommended.

review_finding_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the schemas/ai/review_finding.schema.json review_finding_record this resolution memorises. Required (non-null); a missing ref denies with review_finding_id_ref_required.

review_workspace_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the schemas/vcs/review_workspace.schema.json review_workspace_record the resolution belongs to.

analyzed_scope_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the schemas/ai/review_scope_selection.schema.json review_scope_selection_record the bound finding was minted under. Required (non-null); a missing ref denies with analyzed_scope_id_ref_required.

local_review_findings_store_record_id_re.description: Opaque ref to the schemas/ai/local_review_findings_store.schema.json local_review_findings_store_record this resolution writes through. Required (non-null); the local store row is the durable home of the resolution and the substrate the export packet projects from.

publish_to_review_sheet_id_ref.description: Required (non-null) when resolution_state_class is published_local_only or published_to_review_destination. Null otherwise.

diff_fingerprints.description: Ordered set of fingerprint blocks. minItems = 1 enforces diff_fingerprint_required_at_least_one mechanically so a resolution row never claims freshness without a binding to the bytes the finding was minted against.

predecessor_resolution_id_ref.description: Required (non-null) when resolution_state_class is superseded_by_rerun. Required (non-null) when resolution_state_class is outdated_diff_changed AND the predecessor has been archived (the row's reopen_eligibility_class is reopen_blocked_outdated_must_rerun and the rerun has not yet completed).

successor_resolution_id_ref.description: Optional opaque ref to a successor resolution this row was superseded by (used when a rerun produced a successor).

archived_at.description: Required (non-null) when resolution_state_class is archived_tombstone. Null otherwise.

hosted_review_inbox_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the hosted-review inbox contract. Currently always null.

allOf.description: resolution_state_class in {published_local_only, published_to_review_destination} MUST cite a non-null publish_to_review_sheet_id_ref.

resolution_state_class = superseded_by_rerun MUST cite a non-null successor_resolution_id_ref AND a non-null predecessor_resolution_id_ref (this row is the predecessor; the successor is the rerun output).
resolution_state_class = archived_tombstone MUST cite a non-null archived_at and MUST NOT pair with publish_eligible_* values.

resolution_state_class in {outdated_diff_changed, rerun_recommended} MUST carry publish_eligibility_class = publish_blocked_outdated_lifecycle so the row cannot claim publish capability while the analyzed scope has drifted.

resolution_state_class = suppressed_by_policy MUST be sourced from admin_policy_bundle / repo_instruction_bundle_authored / designated_policy_file / trusted_workspace_pinned_policy / trusted_user_profile_policy AND MUST carry reopen_eligibility_class = reopen_blocked_suppressed_by_policy or reopen_admitted_admin_only.
resolution_state_class = published_to_review_destination MUST carry publish_eligibility_class in the publish_eligible_* set.
resolution_actor_class = ai_review_overlay_recording_only MUST NOT mint published_to_review_destination; the recording-only actor cannot drive a destination write.

resolution_source_class = designated_policy_file is admissible only when an upstream tainted_input_source_record (schemas/ai/tainted_input_source.schema.json) admitted policy_file_role_class = designated_policy_file with non-null signing_evidence_ref; the schema records the requirement on the denial vocabulary as designated_policy_file_source_requires_signed_policy_input.

review_resolution_record.description: Resolution-memory row consumed by the AI review-assist resolution panel, the local review-findings store, the matching publish_to_review_sheet, and audit / support / export. Exactly one row per finding identity (a rerun produces a successor row, not a mutation in place).

actor_ref.description: Opaque ref to the actor identity that drove the transition. Raw user identifiers, raw OAuth tokens, raw mTLS material, raw API keys never appear here.

source_ref.description: Required (non-null) when source_class names a directing source other than the four mechanical-watcher / system-reconciler classes (scope_freshness_watcher / provider_overlay_watcher / rerun_engine / system_reconciler) and other than ai_review_overlay_recording_only / user_in_active_session. Cites the bundle / policy file / review-pack check / admin policy bundle that drove the transition.

reopen_action_admitted.description: True when the to_state is reachable from the from_state under the matching reopen_eligibility_at_transition value. False on a refusal-shaped transition; the audit stream records reopen_action_refused_by_eligibility on the matching denial event.

publish_to_review_sheet_id_ref.description: Required (non-null) when to_state_class is published_local_only or published_to_review_destination.

allOf.description: to_state_class in {published_local_only, published_to_review_destination} MUST cite a non-null publish_to_review_sheet_id_ref.
to_state_class = superseded_by_rerun MUST cite a non-null successor_resolution_id_ref.
actor_class = ai_review_overlay_recording_only MUST NOT mint to_state_class = published_to_review_destination; recording-only actors cannot drive destination writes.

review_resolution_state_transition_recor.description: One state-transition row per move on the resolution-memory state machine. The row pins the from-state, to-state, trigger, actor, source, the reopen-eligibility class at the moment of the transition, and the publish-eligibility class at the moment of the transition; the resolution row then mirrors the to-state.

analyzed_scope_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the scope row the resolution was minted against.

successor_analyzed_scope_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the successor scope row that derived from the original scope. Null when the verdict is no_material_change_resolution_remains_fresh / minor_unrelated_change_resolution_remains_warm / scope_pinned_no_drift_assessable.

allOf.description: material_change_verdict_class in {diff_changed_after_run_resolution_outdated, base_or_head_changed_after_run_resolution_outdated} MUST force forced_to_state_class = outdated_diff_changed and publish_eligibility_after = publish_blocked_outdated_lifecycle.

material_change_verdict_class in {provider_overlay_refreshed_resolution_rerun_recommended, review_pack_or_policy_updated_resolution_rerun_required, instruction_or_check_source_changed_resolution_rerun_required, evaluator_outage_resolution_rerun_required} MUST force forced_to_state_class = rerun_recommended and publish_eligibility_after = publish_blocked_outdated_lifecycle.

material_change_verdict_class = no_material_change_resolution_remains_fresh / minor_unrelated_change_resolution_remains_warm / scope_pinned_no_drift_assessable MUST NOT force the state out of the original; forced_to_state_class is admissible as the original (open / dismissed / published_local_only / published_to_review_destination / suppressed_by_policy / archived_tombstone / superseded_by_rerun).

review_resolution_material_diff_change_r.description: Material-diff-change row recording the verdict a watcher reached when the analyzed scope drifted. Every drift event produces exactly one row so the audit trail can reconstruct why a resolution was forced into outdated_diff_changed / rerun_recommended.

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) when review_resolution_audit_event_id_value is review_resolution_audit_denial_emitted. Null otherwise.

review_resolution_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row on the review_resolution stream.
